title: Restore Bureau release and Registry identity before verification stamps
goal: Restore exact identity between the installed immutable Bureau release, canonical Registry snapshot and current origin/main so verification-stamp and other mutation-gated truth operations can run without stale-runtime-blocked results.

approval.note: Source diagnosis and tests are preauthorized. Runtime refresh must be bound to an exact source commit, Registry tree, deployment manifest and post-refresh readback.

acceptance.assertion: bureau runtime-identity reports compatibility.status=ok and mutation_allowed=true for a clean current Registry checkout.
verification-stamp succeeds for a valid task on the current canonical Registry without release-registry-identity-mismatch.
The immutable release, deployment manifest and canonical Registry snapshot are bound to the same reviewed source commit and recorded tree/package hashes.
No stale-runtime guard is weakened or bypassed; mismatches continue to fail closed with stable reason codes.
Focused runtime identity, refresh, stale/mismatch and verification-stamp tests plus the complete Bureau suite and live post-refresh probes pass.

metadata.deduplication: Repository search found no existing task naming the release/Registry identity mismatch or verification-stamp blockage.
does_not_establish: permission to bypass runtime identity guards
automatic correctness of a runtime refresh
task completion without exact deployment and live readback evidence
validation: Bureau runtime-refresh observation 40b1daef365f9d2b9ba2827130aa0d0afaaa896b21e16d75efb7940b3e3f9b6d bound target commit 11abb346f33223b28846f135f948ee077bfb776d to merged PR #750 and successful validate (3.10)/(3.12) checks.
Durable Grabowski task f3bf4ff5482245b6a8325170 completed once with resume_policy=never and result_sha256 84ec2cb7cd75a00d639b39b3b82824afd579137417fba2a80e0d4a0ca4b59597.
Installer readback validated manifest, immutable package tree, both launchers, Registry snapshot, bureau check and runtime identity on source commit 11abb346f33223b28846f135f948ee077bfb776d.
Post-refresh observation efc96ad48f9b94ebf8f6dcdb0f22551aced9600fc1b6ae20695b6ae7b1db50b0 reports already_current and lag_commits=0.
Clean explicit Registry checkout reports compatibility=compatible, mutation_allowed=true, no reason codes, valid Registry and state integrity ok.
No stale-runtime guard or reason-code handling was changed; the existing reviewed runtime-refresh and identity contracts performed all gating.
tradeoffs: The default installed Registry snapshot remains read-only by design; mutation_allowed=true is asserted only for an explicit clean current checkout.
Later Bureau main commits require a new exact runtime refresh and do not inherit this freshness claim automatically.
metadata.deployment_outcome: The immutable Bureau release, both launchers and the canonical Registry snapshot were refreshed through the reviewed fail-closed runtime-refresh path to exact main commit 11abb346f33223b28846f135f948ee077bfb776d. A clean explicit Registry checkout reports compatibility=compatible and mutation_allowed=true; a second GitHub observation reports already_current with zero lag.

acceptance_evidence.identity-ok: PASS: exact clean checkout and immutable release both identify 11abb346f33223b28846f135f948ee077bfb776d; compatibility is compatible and mutation_allowed is true.
acceptance_evidence.verification-stamp: CONTRACT: acceptance requires a successful verification-stamp against the exact merged task revision and current initiative plan; the readback belongs only in metadata.verification.
acceptance_evidence.deployment-binding: PASS: release 11abb346f332-srcbbdb0e7bf84d, manifest 78397a4036f6f560684ab0c5787bec9ba927a5e0f65f80f7b1102c1d6f3f1236, package tree bbdb0e7bf84d57a8699ffd07e090f57a765f33cdb145f52c230922536738c21a and Registry snapshot tree 297919df3d3fd3673092bf383ba0c7fe6f35fecd38c1225dd45744ddf0dfb7db share the same source commit.
acceptance_evidence.no-bypass: PASS: deployment used a reviewed intent, exact live Grabowski leases, fresh GitHub/CI re-observation, one-shot effect ledger and post-install readback; guards were not weakened.
acceptance_evidence.tests: PASS: both required GitHub matrix checks succeeded on the deployed source; bureau check, runtime identity, installer readback and already-current live probe pass.

metadata.closeout_protocol: Two-stage closeout: first merge deployment evidence with a prepared stable task/plan hash; then refresh the immutable runtime to the exact merge commit, read verification-stamp, and change only state plus metadata.verification.

verification.verification_note: PASS: verification-stamp succeeded against a clean exact Git checkout whose HEAD and origin/main matched the immutable Bureau runtime source commit. The task state is now verified without changing the stable task revision or initiative plan hash.
